ValidationRule.description: Drive Date must be between Program Launch Date and 6 months from Program Launch Date.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Drive_Date__c), OR( Drive_Date__c < EcoProgram__r.Launch_Date__c, Drive_Date__c > ADDMONTHS( EcoProgram__r.Launch_Date__c , 6) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Drive Date must be between Program Launch Date and 6 months from Program Launch Date.
